title: Frontend / SPA / marketing site
summary: Design-heavy web UI with no backend. Drops DB schema; the design-system contract replaces it. Verify splits into visual + a11y + performance gates; watch targets Web Vitals.

stages.title: Draft spec
stages.desc: Plain-language spec of screens, flows, and visual intent.

stages.title: Design-system contract
stages.desc: Agree the tokens/components contract (the artifact a DB schema would have been).

stages.title: Implement (visual loop)
stages.desc: Build UI; render + screenshot + grade against design criteria, iterate.

stages.title: Accessibility gate
stages.desc: axe-core / Lighthouse a11y vs WCAG threshold.

stages.title: CEO smoke test
stages.desc: Real human runs the UI against the smoke-test procedure (mandatory).

stages.title: Watch Web Vitals
stages.desc: Check RUM / Core Web Vitals field data after release.
